# ManagedInstance Sample

This page is generated from the checked-in sample manifest at `config/samples/wlms_v1beta1_managedinstance.yaml`.

| Field | Value |

| Resource | `wlms/ManagedInstance` |
| API Version | `wlms.oracle.com/v1beta1` |

```yaml
#
# Copyright (c) 2021, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
# Licensed under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 as shown at http://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl.

#
# WLMS does not expose CreateManagedInstance or DeleteManagedInstance
# in this SDK pin. This sample binds an existing ManagedInstance by
# OCID and then manages supported in-place configuration updates.
#
apiVersion: wlms.oracle.com/v1beta1
kind: ManagedInstance
metadata:
  name: managedinstance-sample
spec:
  id: ocid1.managedinstance.oc1..exampleuniqueID
  configuration:
    discoveryInterval: 6
    domainSearchPaths:
      - /u01/oracle/user_projects/domains
```
